description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, rectangular layout. The property is surrounded by a low, dark boundary wall and features a driveway leading to a carport or garage area. The house is set amidst landscaped greenery, with several large trees providing shade and privacy. A spacious outdoor area includes a swimming pool with a deck, visible on one side of the house. Large windows and sliding glass doors are prominent, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines and open spaces, blending indoor and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and boundary wall with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open-plan living area, carport, and the swimming pool with adjacent deck.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, backyard, and extensive glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, boundary wall, and landscaped greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, no steps, and is integrated into the boundary wall with a paved driveway and subtle landscaping.
